events.title: Užgavėnės — Shrove Tuesday Celebration
events.description:
Join us for the traditional Lithuanian Shrove Tuesday celebration with blynai, music, and the burning of Morė to chase away winter.

All are welcome. Bring the family!
events.recap: A wonderful evening celebrating the end of winter with the whole community.

events.title: Annual Spring Dinner & Dance
events.description:
Our beloved annual dinner and dance returns. Enjoy traditional Lithuanian cuisine, live music, and an evening with the community.

Tickets available at the door or in advance from board members.

events.title: Lithuanian Language Class — Summer Session
events.description:
Summer session Lithuanian language classes for all ages. Beginner and intermediate levels available.

Contact us to register.

events.title: Joninės — Midsummer Night
events.description: Celebrate the summer solstice at the Lithuanian Cultural Garden. Traditional songs, flower wreaths, and a bonfire.
